changeSet.author: microfina-phase12
changeSet.comment: Grant credit-officer privileges to AGENT_CREDIT role
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO RolePrivilege (id_role, id_privilege) SELECT r.id, p.id FROM Role r CROSS JOIN Privilege p WHERE r.code_role = 'AGENT_CREDIT' AND p.code_privilege IN ('CREATE_CREDIT', 'ANALYSE_FINANCIERE') AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM RolePrivilege rp WHERE rp.id_role = r.id AND rp.id_privilege = p.id )

rollback.sql: DELETE rp FROM RolePrivilege rp INNER JOIN Role r ON rp.id_role = r.id INNER JOIN Privilege p ON rp.id_privilege = p.id WHERE r.code_role = 'AGENT_CREDIT' AND p.code_privilege IN ('CREATE_CREDIT', 'ANALYSE_FINANCIERE')

changeSet.author: microfina-phase12
changeSet.comment: Grant complétude / visa RC / comité / decision privileges to COMITE_CREDIT role
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO RolePrivilege (id_role, id_privilege) SELECT r.id, p.id FROM Role r CROSS JOIN Privilege p WHERE r.code_role = 'COMITE_CREDIT' AND p.code_privilege IN ( 'COMPLETUDE_DOSSIER', 'VISA_RC', 'COMITE_CREDIT', 'REJECT_CREDIT', 'VALIDATE_CREDIT' ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM RolePrivilege rp WHERE rp.id_role = r.id AND rp.id_privilege = p.id )

rollback.sql: DELETE rp FROM RolePrivilege rp INNER JOIN Role r ON rp.id_role = r.id INNER JOIN Privilege p ON rp.id_privilege = p.id WHERE r.code_role = 'COMITE_CREDIT' AND p.code_privilege IN ( 'COMPLETUDE_DOSSIER','VISA_RC','COMITE_CREDIT','REJECT_CREDIT','VALIDATE_CREDIT' )

changeSet.author: microfina-phase12
changeSet.comment: Grant Visa SF + budget + accounting privileges to COMPTABLE role
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO RolePrivilege (id_role, id_privilege) SELECT r.id, p.id FROM Role r CROSS JOIN Privilege p WHERE r.code_role = 'COMPTABLE' AND p.code_privilege IN ( 'VISA_SF', 'RECORD_MOVEMENT', 'CREATE_BUDGET', 'VALIDATE_BUDGET', 'MANAGE_BUDGET', 'BANK_OPERATION', 'MANAGE_BANK_OP', 'MANAGE_CHEQUE' ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM RolePrivilege rp WHERE rp.id_role = r.id AND rp.id_privilege = p.id )

rollback.sql: DELETE rp FROM RolePrivilege rp INNER JOIN Role r ON rp.id_role = r.id INNER JOIN Privilege p ON rp.id_privilege = p.id WHERE r.code_role = 'COMPTABLE' AND p.code_privilege IN ( 'VISA_SF','RECORD_MOVEMENT','CREATE_BUDGET','VALIDATE_BUDGET', 'MANAGE_BUDGET','BANK_OPERATION','MANAGE_BANK_OP','MANAGE_CHEQUE' )

changeSet.author: microfina-phase12
changeSet.comment: Grant cash / deblocage / epargne privileges to CAISSIER role
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO RolePrivilege (id_role, id_privilege) SELECT r.id, p.id FROM Role r CROSS JOIN Privilege p WHERE r.code_role = 'CAISSIER' AND p.code_privilege IN ( 'DEBLOQUER_CREDIT', 'DISBURSE_CREDIT', 'POST_REGLEMENT', 'OPEN_COMPTE_EPS', 'DEPOSIT_EPARGNE', 'WITHDRAW_EPARGNE', 'MANAGE_CASH', 'MANAGE_SAVINGS' ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM RolePrivilege rp WHERE rp.id_role = r.id AND rp.id_privilege = p.id )

rollback.sql: DELETE rp FROM RolePrivilege rp INNER JOIN Role r ON rp.id_role = r.id INNER JOIN Privilege p ON rp.id_privilege = p.id WHERE r.code_role = 'CAISSIER' AND p.code_privilege IN ( 'DEBLOQUER_CREDIT','DISBURSE_CREDIT','POST_REGLEMENT', 'OPEN_COMPTE_EPS','DEPOSIT_EPARGNE','WITHDRAW_EPARGNE', 'MANAGE_CASH','MANAGE_SAVINGS' )

changeSet.author: microfina-phase12
changeSet.comment: Grant supervisory and reporting privileges to SUPERVISEUR role
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO RolePrivilege (id_role, id_privilege) SELECT r.id, p.id FROM Role r CROSS JOIN Privilege p WHERE r.code_role = 'SUPERVISEUR' AND p.code_privilege IN ( 'VIEW_REPORTS', 'EXPORT_REPORTS', 'CLOSE_DAY', 'VIEW_AUDIT' ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM RolePrivilege rp WHERE rp.id_role = r.id AND rp.id_privilege = p.id )

rollback.sql: DELETE rp FROM RolePrivilege rp INNER JOIN Role r ON rp.id_role = r.id INNER JOIN Privilege p ON rp.id_privilege = p.id WHERE r.code_role = 'SUPERVISEUR' AND p.code_privilege IN ( 'VIEW_REPORTS','EXPORT_REPORTS','CLOSE_DAY','VIEW_AUDIT' )

changeSet.author: microfina-phase12
changeSet.comment: Grant read-only reports + audit privileges to AUDITEUR role
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO RolePrivilege (id_role, id_privilege) SELECT r.id, p.id FROM Role r CROSS JOIN Privilege p WHERE r.code_role = 'AUDITEUR' AND p.code_privilege IN ('VIEW_REPORTS', 'VIEW_AUDIT') AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM RolePrivilege rp WHERE rp.id_role = r.id AND rp.id_privilege = p.id )

rollback.sql: DELETE rp FROM RolePrivilege rp INNER JOIN Role r ON rp.id_role = r.id INNER JOIN Privilege p ON rp.id_privilege = p.id WHERE r.code_role = 'AUDITEUR' AND p.code_privilege IN ('VIEW_REPORTS', 'VIEW_AUDIT')

changeSet.author: microfina-phase12
changeSet.comment: Grant any newly-created privileges (P12-003) to ADMIN role — catch-up cross-join
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO RolePrivilege (id_role, id_privilege) SELECT r.id, p.id FROM Role r CROSS JOIN Privilege p WHERE r.code_role = 'ADMIN' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM RolePrivilege rp WHERE rp.id_role = r.id AND rp.id_privilege = p.id )
